# Gwla

**Summary**: A process of preparing and conditioning well log data to improve the quality of elastic logs for seismic interpretation.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-houssain|Houssain, 2016]] used GWLA to condition sonic and density logs in the Unayzah formation.

## Key Results and Findings

- The workflow included QC via histograms/cross-plots and correction of cycle skips using MLR or Gardner's equation. ([[2016-houssain|Houssain, 2016, p. 30]])
